data.company_summary: Stack AI provides a low‑code platform that lets enterprises connect various data sources with large language models to build custom AI agents for specific work‑related tasks. Its customers include Fortune 500 companies such as Activision Publishing and startups like Qualified.com and SafetyCulture. After raising millions in funding in May 2025, the company is accelerating development of its visual multi‑agent system builder and expanding its AI model and data integrations.
recent_news: Closed a multi‑million‑dollar funding round in May 2025 to accelerate development of its visual multi‑agent system builder.
Released a November 2024 product update adding metadata filtering, new AI models, and additional data integrations.
Released an October 2024 product update (details unspecified in the source).
data.growth_signals: Recent multi‑million‑dollar funding round, expanding client base across Fortune 500 enterprises and startups, and accelerated product development roadmap.
challenges: Enabling enterprises to connect disparate data sources with LLMs to create custom AI agents without extensive coding.
Building reliable, multi‑agent AI workflows that can be deployed for specific work‑related tasks.
data.cover_letter_hook: I was excited to see Stack AI’s May 2025 funding round to accelerate its visual multi‑agent system builder, and I want to bring my experience in low‑code AI workflow automation to help scale this platform.
data.cold_email_context: Stack AI’s November 2024 product update introduced metadata filtering and new AI model integrations, expanding the flexibility of its low‑code AI agent platform.
data.relevance_to_role: With Stack AI’s post‑funding focus on scaling its multi‑agent builder and expanding integrations, expertise in low‑code AI workflow design and data‑LLM connectivity is immediately valuable for driving the next wave of product releases.
